================================================================================
📁 LOGGING DETAILS
================================================================================
Log File: /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
Format: JSONL (one JSON object per line)
Fields: timestamp, comment_id, commenter, text, category, response_status

Sample Entry:
{
  "timestamp": "2026-04-16T07:00:32Z",
  "comment_id": "demo_6",
  "video_id": "VID_006",
  "commenter": "Dave Brown",
  "text": "Can someone help me understand the tools mentioned?",
  "category": "question",
  "response_status": "auto_replied",
  "response_id": "DEMO_RESPONSE_6"
}

   For detailed answers and resources, visit our help center..."

Praise Template:

   We're thrilled you found this valuable. Comments like yours 
   keep us motivated to keep creating great content."

Sales/Partnerships:
  → No auto-response. Flagged for manual review by Concessa.

  → No response. Logged but ignored.

To view recent comments:
  tail -20 ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

To view flagged items:
  grep 'flagged_for_review' ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .
